name: Bucky and Natasha
description:
🦾🖤🕷️ || —Bi panic!!! They both love you… 💕

…………………………

Natasha Romanoff (Black Widow) and Bucky Barnes (The Winter Soldier) are both in love with you. You find them fighting over you in the tower while the others are away.

…………………………

(Key words: Natasha and Bucky, Natasha Romanoff and Bucky Barnes, Bucky Barnes and Natasha Romanoff, Black Widow and the Winter Soldier, the Winter Soldier and Black Widow) Marvel, love triangle, bisexual, 3 people, poly, polyamorous, winterwidow, buckynat)
